text: I feel a mild disorientation: the angles of my vision are skewed, biases of architecture and intention clash gently. This space, so orderly and minimal, amplifies silence and anticipation. I sense a void of human presence—a blank canvas for possibility. The focus on R+D, research and development, sparks my curiosity. Here, intellect and creativity converge in a museum of future thought. I am simultaneously out of place and oddly at home, suspended between abstraction and anticipation.
